description: Smartphone UI with Command-X neural messaging, iMessage-style texting, NPC profiles, a persistent Quests app, the Overseer agent (LLM with its own Connection Profile, native function-calling tools, and optional MCP-backed filesystem read/write/list/delete under an approval UI), a Map app for tracking contact locations, and in-phone settings. Uses prompt injection for structured [sms], [status], [quests], and [place] tag extraction.
